        "A": "15, ['Physical health insurance plan details including cost, deductible, quality rating, telemedicine, and gym reimbursement', 'Mental health insurance plan with therapy, psychiatry, crisis intervention, and stress management', 'Property insurance covering photography/electronic equipment and liability protection', 'Travel insurance including business travel, medical evacuation, cancellation, and adventure activities', 'Adventure medical coverage including rescue coordination and global network access', 'Comprehensive plan compliance with German freelancer health insurance requirements', 'Coverage tier and type (standard, health_physical, health_mental, travel, property)', '24/7 emergency and customer support availability', 'Preventive care, prescriptions, and chronic condition management in health plans', 'Global coverage and multilingual support (German/English)', 'Cost analysis including total monthly cost, budget fit, and savings', 'Confirmation of compliance with freelancer insurance laws', 'Availability of immediate enrollment and priority claims', 'Location/geographic coverage specified as Germany/Berlin', 'Proposal and enrollment confirmation requests']"

</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 3, ['Claims Advocacy Service providing legal and claims navigation support', 'Premium Insurance Membership offering 15% discount and dedicated advisor as a membership program', 'Technology Protection add-on for photography gear with accidental damage and extended warranty']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 15, ['Physical health insurance plan details including cost, deductible, quality rating, telemedicine, and gym reimbursement', 'Mental health insurance plan with therapy, psychiatry, crisis intervention, and stress management', 'Property insurance covering photography/electronic equipment and liability protection', 'Travel insurance including business travel, medical evacuation, cancellation, and adventure activities', 'Adventure medical coverage including rescue coordination and global network access', 'Comprehensive plan compliance with German freelancer health insurance requirements', 'Coverage tier and type (standard, health_physical, health_mental, travel, property)', '24/7 emergency and customer support availability', 'Preventive care, prescriptions, and chronic condition management in health plans', 'Global coverage and multilingual support (German/English)', 'Cost analysis including total monthly cost, budget fit, and savings', 'Confirmation of compliance with freelancer insurance laws', 'Availability of immediate enrollment and priority claims', 'Location/geographic coverage specified as Germany/Berlin', 'Proposal and enrollment confirmation requests']

Premium Insurance Membership offering 15% discount and dedicated advisor as a membership program
Technology Protection add-on for photography gear with accidental damage and extended warranty
